content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY, UNIVERSITY, ODISHA, GUNUPUR (GIET UNIVERSITY) OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. \&0\ /GIETU/Exam/2026 Date: - 10/01/2026 NOTICE B ] It is for information of the students concerned that, the Examination Registration for the Semester End Examinations of the following courses will be held as per the schedule given below. - M. Sc. Agronomy | 2024 — 2026 » Students are advised to submit the filled in Registration forms along with the Xerox Copy of Registration fees Dates Registration 12.01.2026 and 14.01.2026 Rs. 2000/- the money receipt to their respective Head of the Department. » Application Received after the due date will not be considered. Controller of Examinations Memo No: {3 Uo)/GIETU/Exam @( Date: 10.01.2026 Copy to: I. The Vice-Chancellor/Registrar / Dean Academics / Dean SoET for information. 2. Dean - SOAG /M. Sc. (Ag) & Horticulture Coordinators for information & necessary action. 3. Accounts Section/ Library/E class/ERP. 4. GIET University Website / Notice Board. Atz (4, GIETU, Gunupur
